title: Infosys Completes CMMI AI Maturity Pilot Assessment
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that it collaborated with CMMI Institute and KPMG on the CMMI AI Maturity framework and completed the related pilot assessment. The announcement highlights Infosys’ role in contributing enterprise-scale AI governance, responsible deployment, and software engineering practices, supported by Infosys Topaz offerings. No financial impact, contract value, guidance, or operating metrics were disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys completed and contributed to the CMMI AI Maturity Framework and Pilot Assessment conducted by CMMI Institute.
Infosys was among the first select group of organizations recognized globally to complete the pilot assessment.
The pilot assessment covered AI-augmented software development, maintenance, testing, and support initiatives across Infosys' service lines and global delivery hubs.

partnerships_or_deals.description: Infosys collaborated with CMMI Institute on the CMMI AI Maturity framework and pilot assessment, contributing enterprise-scale AI governance, responsible deployment, and outcome-driven practices.

important_text_spans.text: Among the first organizations globally to complete the CMMI AI Maturity Pilot Assessment
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the recognition and pilot assessment completion claim.

important_text_spans.text: The pilot assessment covered AI-augmented software development, maintenance, testing, and support initiatives across Infosys' service lines and global delivery hubs.
